name: @vite-powerflow/starter
description: Vite PowerFlow starter template - Monorepo with web app

scripts.validate:static: nx run-many --target=lint --all && nx run-many --target=format --all && nx run-many --target=type-check --all
scripts.validate:quick: nx run-many --target=lint --all && nx run-many --target=format --all && nx run-many --target=test --all
scripts.validate:full: nx run-many --target=lint --all && nx run-many --target=format --all --outputStyle=static && nx run-many --target=test --all && nx run-many --target=test:e2e --all --outputStyle=stream && pnpm build
